_comment: SQLTriage ErrorCatalog. Loaded by ErrorCatalog at startup with FileSystemWatcher hot-reload. Edit via Settings page or directly.

_schema.category: Connection | Query | Permission | Credential | DataShape | Resource | Cache | Config | Runtime | Edge

entries.userMessage: The connection to SQL Server timed out after {0} seconds.
entries.remediation: 1) Verify SQL Server service is running. 2) Check firewall rules for port 1433. 3) Review network latency via ping/tracert. 4) Increase ConnectTimeout in connection string if transient.

audienceMessages.dba: Connection timed out after {0}s — verify instance availability, firewall, and network path.
audienceMessages.it: Network or service outage detected. Verify server uptime and firewall rules.
audienceMessages.exec: A critical server is unreachable. This may indicate an outage affecting business continuity.

entries.governanceImpact: Security -15: Authentication weakness or credential leak risk.
entries.remediation: 1) Verify username/password. 2) Check SQL authentication mode. 3) Ensure account is not locked or disabled. 4) Review failed login audit logs.

audienceMessages.dba: Authentication failed — check credentials, authentication mode, and account status.
audienceMessages.it: A service account or user login is failing. Verify credential vault and account policies.
audienceMessages.exec: Unauthorized access attempt detected. Credential hygiene review recommended.

entries.userMessage: Unable to establish encrypted connection to {0}.
entries.governanceImpact: Security -20: Data in transit may be unencrypted.
entries.remediation: 1) Verify TLS 1.2+ is enabled on both client and server. 2) Check certificate validity. 3) Review Encrypt=True in connection string.

audienceMessages.dba: TLS handshake failed — verify certificate and TLS version compatibility.
audienceMessages.it: Encryption negotiation failed. Review certificate expiry and TLS policy.
audienceMessages.exec: Sensitive data may be transmitted unencrypted. Immediate security review required.

entries.userMessage: A deadlock was detected while executing query {0}.
entries.governanceImpact: Performance -10: User-facing latency and retry storms.
entries.remediation: 1) Capture deadlock graph via Extended Events. 2) Review transaction isolation level. 3) Consider snapshot isolation. 4) Optimize query access patterns to reduce lock contention.

audienceMessages.dba: Deadlock detected — capture graph, review isolation levels, and tune queries.
audienceMessages.it: Database contention causing user-facing delays. Review peak-hour transaction patterns.
audienceMessages.exec: System performance degradation may impact customer experience and SLA commitments.

entries.governanceImpact: Performance -8: Degraded user experience and resource starvation.
entries.remediation: 1) Review execution plan for missing indexes. 2) Update statistics. 3) Consider query rewrite or pagination. 4) Increase CommandTimeout only as temporary measure.

audienceMessages.dba: Query timed out — inspect execution plan, indexes, and statistics.
audienceMessages.it: Slow queries affecting application responsiveness. Capacity planning review suggested.
audienceMessages.exec: Operational delays may erode user trust. Prioritize performance tuning.

entries.governanceImpact: Security -12: Over-privileging or broken least-privilege model.
entries.remediation: 1) Verify required permissions via sys.database_permissions. 2) Grant minimum necessary rights. 3) Document exception if elevated rights are required.

audienceMessages.dba: Permission denied — audit effective permissions and apply least-privilege grants.
audienceMessages.it: Access control gap detected. Review role-based permissions and service account rights.
audienceMessages.exec: Unauthorized data access attempt or broken workflow. Compliance exposure possible.

entries.userMessage: The credential for server '{0}' has expired or is invalid.
entries.governanceImpact: Security -15: Service disruption due to credential lifecycle gaps.
entries.remediation: 1) Rotate credential via credential manager. 2) Update connection string or secret store. 3) Set calendar reminder for next rotation. 4) Enable auto-rotation if supported.

audienceMessages.dba: Credential expired — rotate immediately and update all dependent connection strings.
audienceMessages.it: Password or certificate expiry caused outage. Implement rotation policy and alerting.
audienceMessages.exec: Preventable outage due to credential expiry. Process improvement recommended.

entries.userMessage: Expected column '{0}' was not found in result set.
entries.governanceImpact: Reliability -8: Dashboard or alert pipeline may show stale data.
entries.remediation: 1) Verify query returns expected schema. 2) Check for schema drift in underlying tables. 3) Update panel/check definition if query changed intentionally.

audienceMessages.dba: Result schema mismatch — verify query output and check for schema drift.
audienceMessages.it: Data pipeline compatibility issue. Version control for schema changes recommended.
audienceMessages.exec: Reporting accuracy may be compromised. Validate data governance controls.

entries.userMessage: CPU utilization on '{0}' exceeded {1}% for more than {2} minutes.
entries.governanceImpact: Performance -12: Capacity constraint risks throughput degradation.
entries.remediation: 1) Identify top CPU queries via sys.dm_exec_query_stats. 2) Review missing indexes. 3) Consider query store hints or plan guides. 4) Evaluate hardware scaling.

audienceMessages.dba: CPU pressure — identify heavy queries, missing indexes, and plan regressions.
audienceMessages.it: Server approaching capacity limits. Evaluate scaling or workload redistribution.
audienceMessages.exec: Infrastructure capacity risk. Budget for scaling or optimization initiative.

entries.userMessage: Local cache data for '{0}' appears corrupted and was discarded.
entries.governanceImpact: Reliability -5: Cache miss storm may increase SQL Server load.
entries.remediation: 1) Verify SQLite database integrity via PRAGMA integrity_check. 2) Clear cache and allow rebuild. 3) Review disk health if corruption recurs.

audienceMessages.dba: Cache corruption detected — run integrity check and rebuild cache.
audienceMessages.it: Local storage integrity issue. Verify disk health and backup strategy.
audienceMessages.exec: Minor service degradation. Monitor for recurrence indicating hardware fault.

entries.userMessage: Configuration value '{0}' is invalid or missing.
entries.governanceImpact: Compliance -5: Configuration drift from approved baseline.
entries.remediation: 1) Restore from Config/dashboard-config.default.json if available. 2) Validate JSON syntax. 3) Refer to schema documentation for allowed values.

audienceMessages.dba: Invalid config — restore default, validate JSON, and check schema.
audienceMessages.it: Configuration drift detected. Implement config-as-code and validation gates.
audienceMessages.exec: Process control gap. Strengthen change management for configuration updates.

entries.governanceImpact: Reliability -10: Unhandled exception may leave resources in inconsistent state.
entries.remediation: 1) Review application logs for stack trace. 2) Reproduce with diagnostic logging enabled. 3) Report issue with logs attached.

audienceMessages.dba: Unhandled runtime error — capture logs and stack trace for investigation.
audienceMessages.it: Unexpected system failure. Escalate to engineering with full diagnostic bundle.
audienceMessages.exec: System instability detected. Request root-cause analysis and remediation timeline.

entries.userMessage: Legacy OLE DB provider detected on '{0}'. Support ends {1}.
entries.governanceImpact: Compliance -15: Unsupported component risk for audit.
entries.remediation: 1) Identify consuming applications. 2) Plan migration to MSOLEDBSQL or ODBC. 3) Document exception if timeline exceeds vendor support.

audienceMessages.dba: Legacy provider in use — plan migration to supported driver before support ends.
audienceMessages.it: Technical debt with compliance exposure. Add to risk register and plan remediation.
audienceMessages.exec: Audit risk due to unsupported software. Budget for modernization initiative.
